title: The Flight of the Falcon

"'''The Flight of the Falcon'''" is a comic story originally published in Marvel UK's [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 157|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 157]], written by [[Steve Parkhouse]]. It was later reprinted and colorized in [[Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds 1|''Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds'' 1]].

The comic has no direct relation to the video game ''[[Star Wars: Flight of the Falcon]]''.
